Shopify vs WooCommerce: Which Is Best for UK E-Commerce in 2026?

Author: Kay | Published: 2026-03-20

Shopify and WooCommerce together power over 60% of all online stores. But they serve different needs. Shopify is a hosted platform with managed everything. WooCommerce is a free WordPress plugin that gives you total control.
